arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Connect vocabulary.

content.description: The content of the AWS Connect vocabulary in JSON format.

failure_reason.description: The reason for any failure that occurred during the vocabulary creation or update process.

id.description: The unique identifier for the AWS Connect vocabulary.

language_code.description: The language code of the vocabulary, indicating the language it is used for.

last_modified_time.description: The timestamp of when the vocabulary was last modified.

name.description: The name of the AWS Connect vocabulary.

state.description: The current state of the vocabulary, such as 'ACTIVE' or 'FAILED'.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the vocabulary for organizational purposes.

vocabulary_id.description: The ID of the vocabulary used to uniquely identify it within AWS Connect.
